commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a bundled policy plugin, `openclaw policy check`, doctor lint/health repair plumbing, channel policy conformance checks, oc-path document APIs, docs, tests, and labeler/package metadata.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review findings: source inspection shows malformed policy diagnostics are discarded and `doctor --fix --only` is accepted but not honored. The broader item is a new feature proposal, so there is no current-main bug reproduction path for the product request itself.
